name: minecraft-codex-skills
description: A dual-target Minecraft development skills bundle for Codex and Claude Code.

interface.shortDescription: 12 reusable Minecraft development and operations skills for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Bundle modding, plugin-dev, datapack, commands, testing, CI/CD, world generation, resource pack, server admin, WorldEdit ops, and EssentialsX ops skills in one installable package.
